chat.title: EVA Assistant
chat.subtitle: Ask questions about government policies and procedures
chat.error: Failed to send message. Please try again.

empty.title: Welcome to EVA
empty.message: Select a knowledge space above and start asking questions.

preview.title: Live Preview
preview.description: Live preview will appear here when changes are made

home.description: Configure your EVA instance with custom branding, content, and features

theme.title: Theme Customization
theme.description: Customize colors, typography, and visual appearance

text.title: Text & Content
text.description: Override default text strings and customize content
text.tipDescription: Text overrides support markdown formatting and can be localized per language.

i18n.title: Languages & Localization
i18n.description: Manage bilingual content and translation coverage
i18n.noteDescription: EVA-UI meets federal bilingualism requirements with 100% translation coverage for EN-CA and FR-CA.

features.title: Feature Management
features.description: Enable or disable EVA features and capabilities
features.knowledgeSpacesDesc: Allow users to select different knowledge bases
features.copyMessagesDesc: Allow users to copy messages to clipboard
features.streamingDesc: Stream AI responses in real-time (coming soon)
features.warningDescription: Disabling core features may impact user experience. Test thoroughly before deploying.

deploy.title: Deployment Management
deploy.description: Review deployment readiness and deploy your configuration
deploy.infoDescription: All configuration changes are validated before deployment to ensure GC Design System compliance.

importExport.title: Import / Export Configuration
importExport.description: Export your current configuration or import a saved configuration
importExport.exportDescription: Download your current EVA configuration as a JSON file
importExport.importDescription: Upload or paste a JSON configuration file to restore settings
importExport.warningDescription: Importing a configuration will overwrite your current settings. Make sure to export your current configuration first.
